verdict.note: Chromium 1440: one inset owner across review lists/details, Settings and Projects; exact Back restoration, sticky rails, 8 themes; Graph/Sessions remain local.
Chromium 390: 10px top/bottom inset, no horizontal overflow, detail rails in flow, Fail/Pass and Human review AX, exact Back restoration.

Chromium 1440: scoped/trunk track y=10; real 1463/1533px details pin rails through top/middle/bottom; 8 themes x Evals/Issues list/detail, Settings, Projects; exact Back. Non-exhaustive verdict uses one controlled never-measured HTTP fixture over the real scoped model.

Chromium 390: scoped/trunk track y=10, no horizontal overflow; long details flow rails through top/middle/bottom; direct Settings shares PageScroll; Fail/Pass clear/PUSH/Back and Human review AX/count stability pass with one controlled never-measured fixture.
